---
title: "Jane Cowing"
---

## Jane Cowing

**Dates:** (b. 1807/8)

### Description

governess to the Moberly children

### Biography

She is mentioned in  December 1849 and June 1854 as the Moberly's governess, and appears thus in the 1851 census.  She is listed as a visitor rather than governess in 1861 census, but may have been either. Later [1871 census] she seems to have become a sister of mercy in St. Elizabeth's House, Covent Garden.

### Letters

- Letter from [December 1855]
- Letter from June 1855.
- Letter from June 1854.
- Letter from [November or December 1849?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
